# omada_mdns_reflectors (Data Source)

Lists all mDNS reflector rules on the Omada Controller for the given site.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `site_id` (String) The ID of the site to query.

### Read-Only

- `rules` (Attributes List) List of mDNS reflector rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rules))

<a id="nestedatt--rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules`

Read-Only:

- `client_networks` (List of String) Network IDs where clients discover services.
- `id` (String) The mDNS rule ID.
- `name` (String) The rule name.
- `profile_ids` (List of String) Built-in service profile IDs.
- `service_networks` (List of String) Network IDs where services are provided.
- `status` (Boolean) Whether the rule is enabled.
- `type` (Number) Rule type: 0=AP, 1=OSG (gateway).
